recipes.label: Event density
recipes.blurb: Events in window divided by store count for each area. Surfaces CBSAs that are 'unusually loud' relative to retail footprint.

recipes.label: Openings minus closings
recipes.blurb: Net store openings vs closings per retailer over a chosen window. Reds = net closures, greens = net opens.

recipes.label: Cross-retailer co-occurrence
recipes.blurb: count(primary) × count(competing) per area. Surfaces competitive hotspots vs single-chain dominance.
